ac_text: Login & Access - User must be able to log in via SSO and land on the ZenTravel homepage. - Homepage must show: Create New Trip, Draft Trips, Submitted Trips, Active Requests, Approvals, Cancelled/Closed Trips.
title: Login & Access: SSO login and ZenTravel homepage display
preconditions: General module is available in a stable test environment.
Keyboard and screen-reader checks can be performed.
steps: Navigate to the ZenTravel login page.
Enter valid SSO credentials.
Verify the ZenTravel homepage is displayed with expected sections (Create New Trip, Draft Trips, etc.).
expected_result: User successfully logs in and lands on the ZenTravel homepage with expected sections displayed.

ac_text: Login & Access - User must be able to log in via SSO and land on the ZenTravel homepage. - Homepage must show: Create New Trip, Draft Trips, Submitted Trips, Active Requests, Approvals, Cancelled/Closed Trips.
title: Login & Access: SSO login and ZenTravel homepage display with error
preconditions: General module is available in a stable test environment.
Keyboard and screen-reader checks can be performed.
steps: Navigate to the ZenTravel login page.
Enter invalid SSO credentials.
Verify an error message is displayed indicating invalid login credentials.
expected_result: User fails to log in due to invalid SSO credentials and an error message is displayed.

ac_text: Travel Type Selection - User must select Domestic or International travel. - If International, GMP Request ID must be mandatory and validated.
title: Update succeeds with all required fields populated
preconditions: General module is available in a stable test environment.
User has edit access.
An existing record is available.
test_data: Use values relevant to the visible fields and validation messages.
steps: Open the editable profile screen.
Enter valid values for all mandatory fields.
Save the change.
expected_result: Update succeeds and saved values are visible in the UI.

completeness.reason: Has preconditions, steps, and expected result

ac_text: Travel Type Selection - User must select Domestic or International travel. - If International, GMP Request ID must be mandatory and validated.
title: Blank required field is blocked with inline validation
preconditions: General module is available in a stable test environment.
User has edit access.
test_data: Use values relevant to the visible fields and validation messages.
steps: Open the editable form.
Leave one required field blank and keep the others valid.
Attempt to save.
expected_result: Field-specific validation is shown and the update is blocked without saving partial data.

completeness.reason: Has preconditions, steps, and expected result

defect_detection.reason: Designed to catch failures or misbehavior

ac_text: Travel Type Selection - User must select Domestic or International travel. - If International, GMP Request ID must be mandatory and validated.
title: API rejects request with missing required field
preconditions: General module is available in a stable test environment.
Authorized API client is available.
test_data: Use request payloads and tokens aligned to the scenario.
steps: Prepare an update payload with a missing required field.
Invoke the update API.
Inspect status code and validation payload.
expected_result: API returns a validation or business-rule error and no data update is committed.

defect_detection.reason: Designed to catch failures or misbehavior

completeness.reason: Has preconditions, steps, and expected result

ac_text: Travel Type Selection - User must select Domestic or International travel. - If International, GMP Request ID must be mandatory and validated.
title: Rejected request does not persist partial data
preconditions: General module is available in a stable test environment.
A rejected update scenario is available.
test_data: Use record identifiers that allow before/after comparison in persistence or audit storage.
steps: Trigger the invalid update through the appropriate entry point.
Query the affected record and related audit/history tables.
Compare persisted values with the pre-update state.
expected_result: No partial or unintended persistence is observed after the rejected request.

ac_text: Mandatory Header Fields -Travel Policy (Domestic/International) -Type of Travel (Business/Relocation/Training/Family/Guest/etc.) -Booking Type (Zensar Travel Team / Self-Booked / Egencia) -Reason for Travel -Purpose of Travel -From Country, To Country, Project Details (from Zen Fulcrum) -Forex Required (Yes/No), Advance Required (conditional) -Accommodation Type selection rules must apply. -System must prevent submission if any mandatory field is missing.

ac_text: Soft Block Logic - International travel < 15 days → Show deviation warning. - Domestic travel < 10 days → Show deviation warning.
title: Validate ST1-AC5: International travel < 15 days
preconditions: General module is available in a stable test environment.
Valid business context exists.
steps: Create a new travel request with international travel duration < 15 days.
Observe the system behavior and warning message.
Verify the deviation warning is displayed.
expected_result: The system shows a deviation warning for international travel < 15 days.

completeness.reason: Has preconditions, steps, and expected result

ac_text: Soft Block Logic - International travel < 15 days → Show deviation warning. - Domestic travel < 10 days → Show deviation warning.
title: Validate ST1-AC5: Domestic travel < 10 days
preconditions: General module is available in a stable test environment.
Valid business context exists.
steps: Create a new travel request with domestic travel duration < 10 days.
Observe the system behavior and warning message.
Verify the deviation warning is displayed.
expected_result: The system shows a deviation warning for domestic travel < 10 days.

completeness.reason: Has preconditions, steps, and expected result

ac_text: Soft Block Logic - International travel < 15 days → Show deviation warning. - Domestic travel < 10 days → Show deviation warning.
title: Reject invalid processing for ST1-AC5: International travel < 15 days
preconditions: General module is available in a stable test environment.
An invalid or risky input variant is available.
test_data: Use request payloads and tokens aligned to the scenario.
steps: Send a request with international travel duration < 15 days and invalid data.
Observe the response and persistence behavior.
Verify the error message and rollback or non-persistence.
expected_result: Invalid processing is rejected cleanly without unintended side effects.

defect_detection.reason: Designed to catch failures or misbehavior

completeness.reason: Has preconditions, steps, and expected result

ac_text: Submit Without Segment -System should allow request creation but prevent submission unless at least one travel product (Flight/Hotel/Train/etc.) is added. -Show hard stop on submission if no product added.
title: Validate ST1-AC6: Create a new travel request with at least one travel product
preconditions: General module is available in a stable test environment.
Valid business context exists.
steps: Log in to the ZenTravel homepage using valid credentials.
Click on the 'Create New Trip' button.
Select 'Domestic' or 'International' travel type.
Add at least one travel product (Flight, Hotel, Train, etc.).
Verify the system prevents submission if no product is added.
Observe the system behavior and outcome.
expected_result: The system allows request creation and submission with at least one travel product added.

completeness.reason: Has preconditions, steps, and expected result

ac_text: Submit Without Segment -System should allow request creation but prevent submission unless at least one travel product (Flight/Hotel/Train/etc.) is added. -Show hard stop on submission if no product added.
title: Reject invalid processing for ST1-AC6: Create a new travel request without travel products
preconditions: General module is available in a stable test environment.
An invalid or risky input variant is available.
test_data: Use request payloads and tokens aligned to the scenario.
steps: Send a request to create a new travel request without adding any travel products.
Verify the system returns an error message indicating that at least one travel product is required.
Observe the system behavior and outcome.
expected_result: The system rejects the request and returns an error message due to missing travel products.

defect_detection.reason: Designed to catch failures or misbehavior

completeness.reason: Has preconditions, steps, and expected result

ac_text: Approval Flow -Once submitted, approval hierarchy must follow ZenFulcrum logic. -Special rule: Annual Leave (SA Payroll) must route to SA HR first.
title: Validate ST1-AC7: Approval Flow
preconditions: General module is available in a stable test environment.
Valid business context exists.
steps: Execute the flow using valid data.
Observe system behavior.
Verify the outcome.
expected_result: The business rule is satisfied successfully.

completeness.reason: Has preconditions, steps, and expected result
